mnemonics: SIGnal ACTION: Signals require Action to handle, just like this function name.
keyPoints: Provides more control and information than signal() function
Uses a struct sigaction to specify handler behavior and flags
Allows examination of the current handler without changing it
commonMistakes: Forgetting to initialize the sigaction struct before use
Not setting SA_RESTART flag when wanting interrupted system calls to restart automatically
Confusing sa_handler (simple handler) with sa_sigaction (extended handler)
